title: 2026 Multi-Pack Exclusives
summary: The following vehicles could only be found in Multi-Packs (3, 8, 10, and 20 Packs) in the year 2026. Toy # goes as the following: 3-packs: K5904, 8-packs: HPV78, 9/10-packs: X6999 & 20-packs: H7045. Some multi-pack exclusive vehicles use existing tampo designs but were released with different colors and wheels, these vehicles are mixed into the contents of the multi-pack.

title: List of 2026 Hot Wheels (by Series)
summary: For 2026, the Hot Wheels mainline is numbered 1 through 250 with color variations not receiving a new number. Treasure Hunts and store exclusives are numbered. For the listing by series see List of 2026 Hot Wheels.

title: Gyro Jets
summary: Created page with "Gyro Jets is a small line of Hot Wheels aircraft that was released in 2003. It was created by Dave Martis, Phedon Tsiknopoulos, & others. The craft would station on a handle with a ripcord. Pulling fast at the ripcord the craft would spin upward like a helicopter. But when the blades slowed down, the aerodynamic winged design of the craft would help if glide a far distance away....
